log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Kobold — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 11 falling damage. HP: 167/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 15] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Kobold — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.

Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.

=== ROUND 3 ===

--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 16 damage. Kobold — Armored Escapist HP: 43/59
→ Kobold — Armored Escapist loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 5 vs DC 10]
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 22 damage. Kobold — Armored Escapist HP: 21/59
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Kobold — Armored Escapist HP: 2/59
=== ROUND 4 ===

ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kobold — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 18 damage. Kobold — Armored Escapist HP: 0/59
→ Kobold — Armored Escapist loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 6 vs DC 10]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
